title: Add Microsoft SSO to onboarding doc and update Kate email
Harden API key token endpoint identity access
description: API key auth on /api/token allows minting Twilio tokens for any identity (server/routes/token.js:9). Set req.user to service identity in apiKeyAuth or whitelist allowed identities.

title: Investigate Twilio webhook callback reliability
description: Status callbacks from Twilio conferences were not reaching the backend despite correct URLs, trust proxy, and disabled validation. Poll-based fallback works around this. Root cause unknown. Check Render logs, verify Twilio sends callbacks, test with logging middleware. Files: server/routes/call.js:193, server/routes/voice.js. The explicit URL override in webhook validation may have resolved this.
close_reason: Solved: callbacks arrive but conference-start was late. Added participant-join as trigger, lead dials ~800ms sooner. Poll remains as fallback.

title: Add CSRF protection to state-changing endpoints
description: Cookie-based sessions with sameSite:lax vulnerable to cross-site form POST. Add CSRF token or custom header requirement. Affects: /api/call/initiate, /api/call/end, /api/call/join, /api/history/:id/disposition. File: server/middleware/auth.js

title: Clean up stale DB records when dialLeadWhenReady gives up
description: When poll fallback exhausts retries (server/routes/call.js:101), DB row stays status=connecting forever. Should update to status=failed and remove in-memory conference immediately.

title: Grant Application.ReadWrite.All to stardust-nucleus for programmatic Entra app management
description: Currently granted by Tom manually. Should be an application permission so future app registrations can be created/modified programmatically via Graph API.
